domain: small engines, lawn equipment, generator accessories, carburetor/linkage hardware, and service fixtures

ideas.product_context: Bench servicing single-cylinder lawn mower, tiller, and pressure-washer engines
ideas.core_function: Locks the flywheel rim or cooling fins in place while the crankshaft nut is loosened or torqued
ideas.likely_main_part: CNC-machined crescent clamp body with stepped jaw faces and a threaded locking boss
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires curved gripping geometry, offset bosses, jaw clearances, internal steps, and load-bearing fillets

ideas.product_context: Repairing float-bowl carburetors used on small engines and generators
ideas.core_function: Holds the carburetor body and throttle shaft square while bushings, plates, or screws are serviced
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined fixture block with carburetor mounting holes, shaft-support bores, and datum faces
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines precision coaxial holes, asymmetric mounting patterns, pockets, reference faces, and small fastener features

ideas.product_context: Setting governor arm and throttle linkage travel on lawn equipment engines
ideas.core_function: Provides fixed reference slots and pin positions for checking linkage length and lever sweep
ideas.likely_main_part: Flat machined gauge plate with arced slots, dowel-pin holes, and engraved reference marks
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests curved slot layout, datum-based hole placement, thin-plate proportions, and annotation-friendly mechanical features

ideas.product_context: Accessory for redirecting hot exhaust away from generator frames, cables, or nearby surfaces
ideas.core_function: Mounts to existing muffler guard points and supports an angled deflector shield
ideas.likely_main_part: Bent-or-machined angle bracket with slotted mounting ears, spacer bosses, and shield attachment holes
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires angled planes, elongated slots, standoffs, clearance offsets, and thermal spacing considerations

ideas.product_context: Servicing pull-start assemblies on mowers, trimmers, pumps, and small generators
ideas.core_function: Captures the starter pulley without crushing it so the center fastener or spring cup can be removed
ideas.likely_main_part: Circular nest plate with radial reliefs, center access bore, and removable retaining tabs
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests circular pockets, radial symmetry with interruptions, access clearances, tab interfaces, and nested part geometry

ideas.idea_title: Primer Bulb Retainer Ring Press Tool
ideas.product_context: Installing primer bulb retaining rings on small carburetors and fuel-system housings
ideas.core_function: Presses the retaining ring evenly into a recessed carburetor face without deforming the bulb
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined annular press head with stepped inner clearance and outer locating lip
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires concentric stepped rings, delicate clearance volumes, chamfers, wall thickness control, and contact-surface definition

ideas.idea_title: Small Engine Valve Spring Compression Bridge
ideas.product_context: Cylinder-head service on overhead-valve lawn mower and generator engines
ideas.core_function: Spans the valve cover area and compresses a valve spring using a screw-driven pad
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined bridge frame with forked feet, central threaded boss, and valve-stem clearance window
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines bridge-like structure, threaded boss placement, forked supports, internal cutouts, and force-path geometry

ideas.product_context: Preparing replacement fuel hoses for trimmers, blowers, generators, and compact engines
ideas.core_function: Locates flexible fuel line at repeatable lengths and guides a square cut
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined channel block with hose grooves, length stops, and a blade-guide slot
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests semi-cylindrical grooves, adjustable stop pockets, narrow guide slots, clamp features, and ergonomic fixture geometry

ideas.idea_title: Generator Wheel Kit Axle Spacer Block
ideas.product_context: Accessory hardware for fitting wheel kits to portable generator tubular frames
ideas.core_function: Maintains axle spacing and frame clearance while distributing load around the mounting tube
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined spacer block with saddle radius, through-bolt holes, axle bore, and anti-rotation flats
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires cylindrical saddle cuts, intersecting bores, frame clearance geometry, flats, and load-bearing transitions

ideas.idea_title: Air Filter Cover Latch Replacement Bracket
ideas.product_context: Repair part for cracked or missing latch mounts on mower and generator air filter housings
ideas.core_function: Provides a rigid replacement latch anchor that screws into existing housing points
ideas.likely_main_part: Small machined bracket with hooked latch profile, countersunk holes, and raised locating pads
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests small-scale functional hooks, countersinks, raised pads, asymmetric profiles, and tight packaging constraints
